title: Opening for Category Manager at Tata CLiQ Capital India

jsonLd.title: Opening for Category Manager at Tata CLiQ Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Tata CLiQ Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Category Manager for our Mysuru operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Tata CLiQ Capital India:
Tata CLiQ Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata CLiQ Capital India!
